description: Selected-stage Gold labels joined to raw telemetry for the Nix Substage Detection dashboard.
sql: SELECT * FROM (WITH stage_window AS (SELECT name, stage_num_td, CAST(stage_start_ts AS timestamp) AS stage_start_ts, CAST(stage_end_ts AS timestamp) AS stage_end_ts FROM featurestore:live_td_stage_index_v1 WHERE name = :well_name AND stage_num_td = :stage_num LIMIT 1), gold AS (SELECT name, stage_num_td, CAST(datetime_fmt AS timestamp) AS label_ts, substage FROM featurestore:live_gold_labels_v1 WHERE name = :well_name AND stage_num_td = :stage_num) SELECT t.name AS well_name, s.stage_num_td AS stage_num, t.record_ts AS ts, NULLIF(g.substage, 'NA') AS substage_label, t.rate_slurry, t.press_mainline, CASE WHEN :concentration_feature = 'inline' THEN t.prop_conc_inline WHEN :concentration_feature = 'target' THEN t.prop_conc_target WHEN :concentration_feature = 'auger' THEN t.prop_conc_blend_auger ELSE t.prop_conc_blend_denso END AS selected_concentration, CAST(NULL AS DOUBLE PRECISION) AS inferred_pressure, CAST(NULL AS DOUBLE PRECISION) AS design_rate, CAST(NULL AS DOUBLE PRECISION) AS design_rate_high, CAST(NULL AS DOUBLE PRECISION) AS design_rate_rampdown FROM stage_window s JOIN datastore:live_fleet_stream_customer_full_v1 t ON t.name = s.name AND t.record_ts >= s.stage_start_ts AND t.record_ts <= s.stage_end_ts LEFT JOIN gold g ON g.name = t.name AND g.stage_num_td = s.stage_num_td AND g.label_ts = t.record_ts ORDER BY t.record_ts) q
